description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift   to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Beige satchel style bag with brown trims, has a flap with metal stud button closure Two press button pockets uner the flap One main compartment with a fabric inner and a zipped pocket Has an adjustable shoulder strap Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 28 cm  Width: 34 cm  Depth: 12 cm
